title: Sree Kattayattu Bhagavathi Kshethram
tagline: Sree Kattayattu Bhagavathi Kshethram — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kattayattu Devi Kshethram is a Devi temple situated in Peruvayal, a village near Kozhikkode, India.
overview.description: Kattayattu Devi Kshethram is a Devi temple situated in Peruvayal, a village near Kozhikkode, India.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kittampalayam
topPlaces.description: Kittampalayam is a village near Mettupalayam in Coimbatore district, Tamil Nadu state in India.

topPlaces.name: Kembanur
topPlaces.description: Kembanur is a small village which is located in Marudur panchayat next to Coimbatore city, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located near Mettupalayam.

topPlaces.name: Marudur, Coimbatore
topPlaces.description: Marudur is a panchayat village located near Karamadai in the Coimbatore District, of Tamil Nadu in India.

topPlaces.name: Sottaiyur
topPlaces.description: Sottaiyur is a village located in Punjai Pugalur Municipality in Karur District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Mettupalayam, Coimbatore
topPlaces.description: Mettupalayam is a town in the Coimbatore District of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the second largest town in the Coimbatore district after Pollachi.

topPlaces.name: Jadayampalayam Pudur
topPlaces.description: Jadayampalayam Pudur is a small village, located 4 km from Mettupalayam town, on Mettupalayam-Tirupur state highway 80. The village become very famous because of its residential development.

topPlaces.name: Karamadai
topPlaces.description: Karamadai is a municipality in Mettupalayam taluk of Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Spread across an area of 10 km2 (3.9 sq mi), it had a population of 35,166 individuals as per the 2011 census.

topPlaces.name: Karumathampatti
topPlaces.description: Karumathampatti is a town in Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It was a panchayat town till 2021, when it was elevated to a municipality.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sree Kattayattu Bhagavathi Kshethram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sree Kattayattu Bhagavathi Kshethram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sree Kattayattu Bhagavathi Kshethram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (30 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (29 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sree Kattayattu Bhagavathi Kshethram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sree Kattayattu Bhagavathi Kshethram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sree Kattayattu Bhagavathi Kshethram?
faq.a: Stays in Sree Kattayattu Bhagavathi Kshethram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sree Kattayattu Bhagavathi Kshethram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kittampalayam, Kembanur, Marudur, Coimbatore, Sottaiyur, Mettupalayam, Coimbatore.
